_meta.note: 5-pack closing Stafford SB to 7-of-7 EVIDENCE-FINALIZED + opening CA Big-City Mayors cluster. (1) Susan Randall — 2nd-term GOP-endorsed Stafford SB-George Washington (sworn Jan 2020; UNOPPOSED Nov 2023 except R-on-R primary; current 4-yr term 1/2024-12/2027); Stafford GOP team-members listing confirmed; PARTY FIX Unknown→R; Brooke Point HS science teacher 1993-2000 then PTA-trained community volunteer; 5-yr Ferry Farm PTA Pres; Governance Committee Chair 2026 (board Chair Warner 2026; VC Chase). HARD TRUE refuse_state_overreach q1 + q2 from Feb 10 2022 mask-rescind MOTION-of-record (5-2 with Healy+Warner YES vs Chase+Guy NO) with quoted dais rationale 'masking is no longer practicable for Stafford County' — direction: declined carry-over state COVID-mandate framework AND asserted local-conditions subsidiarity. NOT a Vlaming amicus signatory (confirmed — only Warner among current Stafford SB signed July 2022 brief) — NULL not TRUE per Healy precedent (non-signature ≠ affirmative scoreable). Sparse-data caveat: 2 HARD TRUE / 0 FALSE / 63 null on a 65-cell denominator — UI denominator-floor flag for Adam review. (2) Wanda Blackwell — FRESHMAN D-endorsed Stafford SB-Garrisonville (sworn Jan 2026; succeeded former SB-Chair Maureen Siegmund whom she defeated by 20-pt margin in 3-way race Nov 2025 48%-28.07%-23.30% over Mojica R); PARTY FIX Unknown→D (Stafford Dem Committee + Virginia Democratic Women's Caucus donor + iVoterGuide 'Liberal (Conditional)'); retired Army E-8 / HR Specialist 21.5 yrs + retired-fed-2025; MPA Criminal Justice (Troy State) + MS Organizational Mgmt (Capella); Stafford NAACP 1st/2nd Vice-Pres; daughter NSHS grad. HARD FALSE economic_stewardship q2 from Feb 25 2026 PRELIM $529.3M FY27 SCPS budget 6-1 YES bloc by mathematical deduction (Healy SOLE NO) — partition cite vs Healy HARD TRUE. Declined iVoterGuide questionnaire + Potomac Local interview + FXBG Advance most-substantive items; deliberately narrow on-campaign-issues posture similar to Regan. 'Raised in church / church dance leader' biographical only; denomination NOT publicly named → Christian-institution flag NULL per cite-only. Sparse-data caveat: 1 HARD FALSE / 0 TRUE / 64 null on 65-cell denominator — UI denominator-floor flag. (3) Kate Gallego — Phoenix Mayor (3rd term; sworn March 2019 special runoff 58.6% vs Valenzuela; re-elected Nov 2020 + Nov 5 2024 64.27% vs Matt Evans; current term April 2025-April 16 2029 her FINAL per term limits); Jewish (had bat mitzvah Albuquerque) — NOT Christian → christian_liberty cells partial direct-action scoring only. PARTY confirmed D. 10 HARD FALSE multi-vector orthodox-D LOCAL profile: sanctity_of_life q0 + q1 (Oct 2022 6-2 Phoenix Council abortion-deprioritization vote + 2024 reinforcement on AZ 1864 ban), biblical_marriage q2 + q4 (first-in-AZ-history Pride + Transgender flag raisings at City Hall June 2019 + annual Pride proclamations 2019/2021/2022 — affirmative public LGBT-ally posture), family_child_sovereignty q2 (Phoenix Office of Diversity, Equity and Inclusion FY21-22 budget + 2022 stand-up), christian_liberty q3 (2016 backed REPLACING council prayer with moment of silence after Satanic Temple flap with quote 'if we have prayer, we welcome all points of view'), refuse_state_overreach q2 (Aug 2, 2021 indoor mask rule for all City of Phoenix facilities + Nov 2021 vaccination mandate for ~13,000 City employees within ~2 months or job-loss with quote 'will save lives'), border_immigration q1 + q2 (March 2023 Phoenix Office of Refugee and Immigrant Support ORIS established + Nov 2024 declaration 'as long as I'm mayor Phoenix will not use its police department — or any city resources whatsoever — to assist in mass deportation efforts'), self_defense q1 (June 2023 Phoenix Ordinance S-50010 to donate seized firearms to Ukraine — AZ ARS preemption-hostile firearms-disposal). Heterodox catches: rebuffed DOJ Phoenix-PD consent decree June 2024 + YoY police budget INCREASES ($27M FY24-25 + $46M FY25-26 → $1B/yr) DOES NOT clear public_justice q0 HIGH BAR per rubric (budget votes alone ≠ affirmative back-the-blue advocacy) → NULL not TRUE. ShotSpotter-cancel expected-hit DOES NOT verify in evidence (Phoenix ran ASU smart-cities AI gunshot pilot, no cancellation) — flagged for narrative not scored. Refuse_state_overreach q0 'defied Ducey on mask mandate' = LEFT-of-state COVID-restrictionist, not conservative subsidiarity → NULL per rubric. K-12 cells NULL because Phoenix mayor has no LAUSD/PUSD portfolio. Election integrity NULL (Maricopa County runs elections). (4) Karen Bass — LA Mayor (43rd; sworn Dec 12 2022 same day issued Declaration of Local Emergency on homelessness + ED 1; current term through 2026; reelection cycle unverified-in-pass); Baptist (biographical only — no scoreable Christian public-profession on mayoral dais → christian_liberty NULL); former CA Assembly Speaker 2008-2010 (first Black woman state Speaker in US history) + US House CA-37/CA-33 2011-2022 + founder Community Coalition 1990. PARTY confirmed D. FEDERAL-record floor: most CA-37 floor votes do NOT score for LOCAL mayoral cells unless ratified by mayoral action (cite-only LOCAL discipline). 5 HARD FALSE + 1 HARD TRUE LOCAL profile: sanctity_of_life q1 FALSE (mayoral LA reproductive-rights march WITH VP Kamala Harris explicitly headlined as pro-abortion-rights mayoral advocacy — LOCAL mayoral public event + NARAL-endorsed mayoral candidate + Keep LA Pro-Choice mayoral petition), biblical_marriage q2 FALSE (mayoral support for 'protecting access to gender-affirming care' for trans youth + April 2024 TransLatin@ Coalition visit + LA Transgender Advisory Council under her tenure), biblical_marriage q4 FALSE (June 4 2024 SIGNED ordinance to fly Pride Flag over LA City Hall for FIRST TIME IN HISTORY with quote 'now more than ever, we must stand together' — historic-first affirmative LGBT promotion), economic_stewardship q2 FALSE ($1B FY25-26 deficit + initially proposed 1,600+ layoffs then walked back + $1B/4-yr LAPD raise contract + Inside Safe spending + ED 1 housing accelerator — pattern of deficit growth not structural reform), border_immigration q1 + q2 FALSE (Dec 9 2024 SIGNED Ordinance 188441 codifying LA as sanctuary city explicitly 'prohibits use of any City resources, personnel, property and data to support federal immigration enforcement' + July 11 2025 Executive Directive 17/12 banning ICE from staging on city property + Immigrant Affairs Liaisons + Abbott migrant-bus 'abhorrent' framing + cash-aid-to-illegal-immigrants proposal per signalscv July 2025), public_justice q0 HARD TRUE — HIGH BAR CLEARED (Dec 2023 SIGNED $1B/4-yr LAPD raise package + FY24-25 +$138M LAPD + FY25-26 $3.3B LAPD allocation + restored hiring with funding for 240 additional recruits + on-dais sought-the-raises rationale 'to better recruit and retain officers' — affirmative advocacy reversal documented by LA Public Press headline 'from fighting cops to funding them while LA's budget burns'). Refuse_state_overreach NULL — Bass opposes Trump from the LEFT (National Guard deployment June 2025) + opposes Newsom from the LEFT (encampment-clearing order); neither maps to Christian-conservative-coded state-overreach refusal vector. Sole-non-budget crisis-leadership negative signal (Jan 4-8 2025 Ghana trip during Palisades Fire Jan 7 + 'It was a mistake to travel' admission) does not map cleanly to any rubric cell → narrative-only flag. Federal NARAL 100% / PP 100% / Everytown / HRC 100% lifetime NOT scored at LOCAL — FEDERAL FLAG. (5) Rick Caruso — STATUS UPDATE: Jan 16 2026 publicly announced he will NOT seek any 2026 public office (neither LA Mayor nor CA Governor) focusing instead on Steadfast LA wildfire-recovery nonprofit per Westside Current + LAMag — candidacy_status FIX archetype_curated→not_running. Lost 2022 LA Mayor general 55-45 to Bass after spending >$100M personal. Devout Roman Catholic (Papal Knight Commander of the Order of St. Gregory the Great bestowed Jan 14 2017 by Pope Francis at Cathedral of Our Lady of the Angels). Multi-flip party history R→Decline→R(2016 donated $240K to Kasich super-PAC vs Trump)→Independent 2019→D Jan 2022 ~3 weeks before LA Mayor filing; current registration D but PARTY label heterodox-D-coded. Real-estate developer (Caruso — The Grove + Americana at Brand + Palisades Village + Commons at Calabasas + Rosewood Miramar Beach); Pepperdine JD 1983; LA DWP Commissioner (youngest ever, age 26); LA Police Commission President 2001-2003 (appointed by Mayor Hahn); USC Board of Trustees Chair 2018-2022; Loyola HS Board Chair; Ronald Reagan Presidential Foundation Trustee. 4 HARD TRUE + 3 HARD FALSE classic-crossover LOCAL profile: public_justice q0 HARD TRUE (LAPD Commission President 2001-2003 + 2022 LA Mayor platform pledged +1,500 LAPD officers / +budget + UNANIMOUS endorsement of LAPD Police Protective League PAC and board — affirmative back-the-blue advocacy clearing HIGH BAR), public_justice q1 HARD TRUE (June 2024 endorsed Nathan Hochman against progressive DA George Gascón attacking Gascón's 'pro-criminal creeds' + 2022 platform mandatory misdemeanor prosecution by City Attorney + expanded LAPD Gun Unit + doubled gang-prevention workers), christian_liberty q0 HARD TRUE (publicly identified Roman Catholic; accepted Papal Knight Commander honor + led consecration/expansion of Our Savior Catholic Church at USC + major Catholic-cause donor — public profession of Christ-ward faith identity on civic dais), economic_stewardship q2 SOFT TRUE captured in narrative not scored (anti-corruption 'clean up LA' core 2022 platform attacking city waste/grift does not cleanly map to CBDC/sound-money/balanced-budget rubric — null) NOT separately scored. biblical_marriage q4 HARD FALSE (sustained 2022 pro-LGBT mayoral campaign posture per LGBTQ Nation 'transform Los Angeles LGBTQ city's new mayor' + 2016 banned Manny Pacquiao from The Grove over anti-same-sex-marriage remarks + Pride-affirming Instagram reel 'Pride is about caring and community' — affirmative LGBTQ+ promotion in public-facing platform), border_immigration q1 HARD FALSE (June 2025 publicly called Trump ICE deportations 'wrong' and 'cruel' + partnered with LA Catholic community to raise $110K for ICE-impacted families per The Real Deal + Traders Union — opposes mandatory deportation framework), self_defense q1 HARD FALSE (2022 LA Mayor platform proposed expanding safe-storage laws + gun-removal from domestic abusers + expanded LAPD Gun Unit — new restrictions framework not opposition to red-flag/mag-limits). 1M+ FEC/CA Sec State donations history to anti-abortion GOP politicians (~$240K Kasich 2016 + $100K Bush 2004 PAC + $50K McCarthy PAC + direct $4-5K Sen McConnell/McCarthy) WHILE running as 'always pro-choice always supported Roe' D-mayoral 2022 — donation paradox NULL per cite-only (federal-PAC pattern not local mayoral action). 2007 LA Magazine paraphrase opposing abortion in most cases insufficient for current-cycle sanctity_of_life cell scoring. CROSS-BATCH STAFFORD MILESTONE: STAFFORD SB NOW 7-OF-7 EVIDENCE-FINALIZED (Warner Chair + Regan Aquia + Healy Rock Hill + Chase VC Falmouth + Fingerholz Hartwood freshman from prior 2110+2201 batches + Randall GW + Blackwell Garrisonville this batch); STAFFORD BOS already 7-OF-7 from prior batches (Vanuch+English+Diggs+Evans+Guy+Yeung+Allen); STAFFORD CA Olsen also done — STAFFORD COUNTY NOW 15-OF-15 FULLY EVIDENCE-FINALIZED FOR 2026 CYCLE. CA Big-City Mayor cluster opened: Gallego AZ Phoenix + Bass LA + Caruso LA candidate-out — next picker rolls to Gloria SD + Lurie SF + Becton Contra Costa DA. RICK-WEST 9TH-CONSECUTIVE-DEFER (NOT re-escalating per runbook discipline; 7th-defer warning-level ping already sent in 2026-06-04 1730 batch). Sparse-data UI denominator-floor caveat strongly applies to Randall (2 cells) + Blackwell (1 cell) — recommend Adam review.

profile.religion: NO PUBLIC EVIDENCE FOUND — campaign site, Ballotpedia profile, and press coverage do not identify a church, denomination, or personal profession of Christian faith.
profile.education: Dual B.S. Biology and Secondary Education, Old Dominion University.
profile.background: Former Brooke Point HS science teacher (Biology / Marine Biology / Environmental Science) 1993-2000; homemaker / community volunteer since 2000. Stafford resident since 1974. Three children all SCPS-educated; oldest became a teacher at Kate Waller Barrett ES before relocating. PRIOR CIVIC: Ferry Farm PTA President 5 years and board member 7 years; SCPS Capital Improvement Plan Advisory Committee chair/vice-chair; Educational Specifications Committee; Parent Advisory Committee under three superintendents. FIRST ELECTED Stafford SB-George Washington Nov 5 2019 (open-seat 61.2% vs Carol Medawar 38.5%) — sworn Jan 2020; RE-ELECTED Nov 7 2023 61.6% vs Sarah Baker (4-yr term 1/2024-12/2027). PRIOR LEADERSHIP: SB Vice-Chair 2 years + SB Chair 1 year. CURRENT: SCPS Governance Committee Chair (2026 board Chair = Warner; VC = Chase). STAFFORD GOP-ENDORSED + Stafford GOP 'Team Members' page listing at staffordgop.com/team-members/susan-randall-2.

susan-randall.notes_set: [2026-06 RESOLUTE refinement] Roster verified: Stafford SB-George Washington since Jan 2020 (NOT a 2026 freshman — 2nd term); re-elected Nov 7 2023 61.6% vs Sarah Baker; current 4-yr term 1/2024-12/2027; prior SB Vice-Chair 2 yrs + Chair 1 yr; current Governance Committee Chair (2026). profile.religion: Jewish (had bat mitzvah in Albuquerque per biographical sources) — NOT Christian; christian_liberty cells scored on direct civic action only, not on personal-faith profession.
profile.education: A.B. Environmental Science / Public Policy, Harvard University (2004); MBA, Wharton School at University of Pennsylvania (2012).
profile.background: Born Katharine Sarah Widland in Albuquerque NM; raised by attorney parents. Strategic planning / economic development at Salt River Project (utility) 2005-2014. PRIOR OFFICE: Phoenix City Council District 8 2014-2018. FIRST SWORN as Phoenix Mayor March 21 2019 (special-runoff 58.6% vs Daniel Valenzuela after Greg Stanton resigned for US House). RE-ELECTED Nov 2020 (full term) + Nov 5 2024 64.27% vs Matt Evans. CURRENT term sworn April 2025; expires April 16 2029 — her FINAL term per Phoenix mayoral term limits. ROLES: Chair, Climate Mayors (national); US Conference of Mayors board. FAMILY: divorced from then-US Rep Ruben Gallego (married 2010 — divorce 2017 finalized while pregnant); one son Michael born 2017.

CURRENT term through 2026; 2026 reelection cycle unverified-in-pass. profile.religion: Devout Roman Catholic — Knight Commander of the Order of St. Gregory the Great bestowed by Pope Francis Jan 14 2017 at Cathedral of Our Lady of the Angels by Abp José Gómez; led consecration/expansion of Our Savior Catholic Church at USC; major donor to Catholic causes; Loyola HS Board Chair.
profile.education: Pepperdine University School of Law J.D. 1983 (undergraduate degree at USC).
profile.background: Founder/Executive Chairman, Caruso (real-estate developer — The Grove + Americana at Brand + Palisades Village + Commons at Calabasas + Rosewood Miramar Beach hotel). Former real-estate attorney at Finley Kumble. PRIOR CIVIC POSTS: LA Department of Water & Power Commissioner (youngest ever, age 26); LA Police Commission member 2001-2005 + LA Police Commission PRESIDENT 2001-2003 (appointed by Mayor James Hahn); USC Board of Trustees member from 2007 + USC Board CHAIR 2018-2022; Loyola HS Board Chair; Ronald Reagan Presidential Foundation & Institute Board of Trustees. PARTY HISTORY (4 flips in 11 yrs): R (long-time) → Decline-to-State 2011 → R again March 2016 ($240K to Kasich super-PAC vs Trump) → Independent 2019 → D Jan 2022 (~3 weeks before LA Mayor filing). 2022 LA MAYOR RACE: lost general 55-45 to Karen Bass after spending >$100M of personal money. 2026 CANDIDACY: Jan 16 2026 publicly announced he will NOT seek any 2026 public office (neither LA Mayor nor CA Governor) per Westside Current + LAMag — focus on Steadfast LA wildfire-recovery nonprofit. FAMILY: wife Tina Caruso (philanthropist + Gigi C swimwear co-founder), married since 1987 (~37 yrs); four children — Alex, Gregory, Justin, Gianna.
